data.title: A whale spent 2.5 million USDC to build a LIBRA position three hours ago and then sold it at a loss of nearly $700,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the transactions of LIBRA front row exceeding one million US dollars in the past 24 hours are all swing trading. Among them, the whale 5AS99...H48Sm seems to be doing T in the opposite direction, losing $695,000 in seven minutes. Three hours ago, he spent 2.5 million USDC to buy at an average price of $0.5206. Just after the position was established, it plummeted five minutes later, and could only sell in batches at an average price of $0.3759.

data.title: President of The ETF Store: Crypto should not be blamed for being “rug pulled” by the President’s Meme Coin, and the technology will develop further
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store, wrote on X: "It only takes a few clicks to create a Meme coin, which is why 60,000 Meme coins are created every day, and everyone knows it.
At this point, if you are "rug pulled" - whether it is Trump, Milley or others - this is not an accusation against Crypto, but your own "pot". For my traditional financial friends who have not played Meme coins yet, the focus should be on technology, not "scams (grift)".
The technology is almost flawless, it is now just a real-time testing environment for what you see, but it will develop further from this stage."

data.title: Elon Musk Removes 'Volunteer Tech Support' From X Profile
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk has removed the description 'Volunteer Tech Support' from his X profile. This change in Musk's profile comes amid ongoing developments and discussions surrounding his various ventures and public engagements.

data.title: Tyr Capital Chief Investment Officer: ETH trend may reverse and rise to $4,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Tyr Capital Chief Investment Officer Ed Hindi said that ETH is at "peak bearishness" and the price trend may be about to reverse and rise to $4,000. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Tencent Integrates DeepSeek Into WeChat AI Search
data.description: According to Odaily, Tencent has begun a trial integration of DeepSeek into WeChat's 'Search' feature, enhancing AI search capabilities. Users included in the trial can access the 'AI Search' option at the top of the search dialog box, allowing them to use the full version of the DeepSeek-R1 model for a more diverse search experience. Additionally, Tencent is exploring the integration of DeepSeek into other products, such as Tencent Cloud AI Code Assistant and Tencent Yuanbao, to offer users a richer experience and services.

data.title: Tyr Capital CIO Predicts Potential ETH Price Reversal
data.description: According to Odaily, Ed Hindi, the Chief Investment Officer of Tyr Capital, has indicated that Ethereum (ETH) is currently experiencing 'peak bearishness.' He suggests that this could lead to a price reversal, potentially driving the value up to $4,000.

data.title: Musk: Grok 3 will be released at 8 pm local time next Monday
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk posted on X that Grok 3 will be released at 8 pm Pacific Time next Monday (12 noon Beijing Time the next day) and will be demonstrated live. He also said that this will be the smartest artificial intelligence on earth.

data.title: Elon Musk Announces Grok 3 AI Launch With Live Demonstration
data.description: According to PANews, Elon Musk announced via Twitter that Grok 3, described as 'the smartest AI on Earth,' will be released on Monday at 8 PM Pacific Time. A live demonstration of the artificial intelligence system will accompany the launch.

data.title: Nearly 4,000 wallets increased their holdings of WAVAX in a single day, 1.8 times the recent average
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News After Binance added AVAX as a cashback option for its Bybit Card product, TheTie data showed that a total of 3,898 wallets on the Avalanche blockchain increased their holdings of Wrapped AVAX (WAVAX) in the past 24 hours, almost double the recent average of 1,600 wallets. However, whether this buying activity will translate into price stability or rebound remains to be seen.
According to reports, WAVAX can achieve wider compatibility in DeFi applications. The increasing number of wallets holding WAVAX may indicate that users are ready for future DeFi activities. Avalanche's DeFi ecosystem, which includes major protocols such as Aave and Lido, has seen a slight decline in TVL over the past few months, but the network's transaction volume has been steadily increasing. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Startale CEO: Meme coin has become the main use case in the current crypto industry, and this problem must be solved
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sota Watanabe, CEO of Startale, said in a post on X: "When I entered the cryptocurrency industry about 10 years ago, I was excited about how technology could empower people and improve society. Now, 10 years later, the main use case of this industry is Meme coin. I don't deny this situation, but this problem must be solved."
